info.english_meaning: to shave to perform a sacrifice to initiate a mantra to perform sacred thread ceremony to practise self-restraint to teach religious activities
info.hindI_arTa: muRqana karanA yajYa karanA dIkzA denA upanayana karanA Atmanigraha karanA Darma siKAnA AdeSa denA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' mORqyaM = vapanam  ijyA = yajanam  upanayanam = mOYjIbanDaH niyamaH = saMyamaH  vratAdeSaH = saMskArAdeSakaTanam ' iti kzIrasvAmI  " asyArTO vratasamprApti: tadBedAH kaTitA ime  sA ca mORqyAt kvacit kvApi dIkzaRIyAdikejyayA .. upanItyA kvacit  kvApi niyamagrahamAtrataH  kvacit gurvAdinande te (?) vratamastviti SAsanAt .. ... dIkzate vAggamI yajamAnastu mARavaH  tapase ca mahAnAmnyE (?) tatra hyAdeSanA vratam .." iti DAtukAvyavyAKyAne proktam

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'nedizWamupadIkzya tena saha yajeran' (kA0 SrO0 251327) upadIkzya dIkzayitvA vratamAdiSya
